channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team. The Hurricanes acquired forwards Mikko Rantanen from the Colorado Avalanche and Taylor Hall from the Chicago Blackhawks in a three-team trade Friday night.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys say offensive coordinator Brian Schottenheimer will be storied franchise’s next coach
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys say offensive coordinator Brian Schottenheimer has agreed on a deal to become the storied franchise’s next coach.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina gets another big win against No. 5 LSU to continue SEC domination
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina showed once more who’s in charge of the Southeastern Conference. The No. 2 Gamecocks (19-1, 7-0 SEC) got 14 points from Joyce Edwards and used their trademark lockdown defense to end No. 5 LSU’s perfect start to the season with a 66-56 victory on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bills star Dion Dawkins says there should be a 'Protector of the Year' award for offensive linemen
item.description: Buffalo Bills star left tackle Dion Dawkins says he is going to campaign for offensive linemen to have an award given to them at the end of each season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jannik Sinner beats Ben Shelton to return to the Australian Open final
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Defending champion Jannik Sinner overcame some third-set cramping and beat Ben Shelton 7-6 (2), 6-2, 6-2 on Friday to return to the Australian Open final as he seeks a third Grand Slam title. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman indicted on charges from crash that killed Vikings player, 2 others in car crash
item.description: A woman faces 30 years in jail after being indicted on charges from a car crash that killed Minnesota Vikings player Khyree Jackson and two others.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Military heroes honored at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The Farmers Insurance Open is not just showcasing some of the world’s best golfers — it’s also paying tribute to the heroes of our nation, offering service members special access and recognition throughout the week.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Steph Curry to start NBA All-Star Game in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is set to happen in San Francisco next month, and the city's biggest star was named one of the game's 10 starters. The NBA revealed the starters on Thursday, and Stephen Curry was among them. It will be Curry's 11th All-Star Game.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: USF Men's Tennis starts season off undefeated
item.description: The USF Bulls improved to 3-0 with victory at Stetson. The USF Men’s Tennis team earned a 5-2 win in their first road match of the spring season on Monday, Jan. 20.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: RSL players Diego Luna and Emeka Eneli shine for US Men's National Team
item.description: After subbing into the match against Venezuela on Saturday night to help the U.S. Men’s National Team secure a 3-1 victory, Real Salt Lake stars Emeka Eneli and Diego Luna earned starts on Wednesday night in a commanding 3-0 victory over Costa Rica.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles selling snow collected from NFC divisional win
item.description: The snow was collected, carefully preserved and authenticated by the grounds crew to allow fans to own a genuine piece of Eagles history, the team said.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, NewsNation

item.title: Mitchell High School alum playing for Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays are gearing up for the season. Mitchell High School alum and Tampa Bay native, Trevor Harrison, is headed to Rays camp in just a few weeks.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU bounces back with 83-67 win over Colorado
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) - After losing four of its last five games, the BYU basketball team turned it on in the second half in route to an 83-67 win over Colorado Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Evans' goal late in the third period completes Canadiens' rally past Lightning in 3-2 victory
item.description: Jake Evans scored the winning goal with 2:15 remaining to rally the Montreal Canadiens past the Tampa Bay Lightning 3-2 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The sweet stench of NHL hockey
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Hockey players sweat buckets, perhaps more than any other athletes in any other sport. They are wearing sweaters, after all. "It's disgusting," said Utah Hockey Club center Liam O'Brien.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL signs Brazilian goalkeeper Rafael Cabral
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has gone into South America to find its new starting goalkeeper. RSL announced the signing of Brazilian keeper Rafael Cabral Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah closes homestand strong with 5-2 win over Winnipeg
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After a slow start to their season-long 7-game homestand, the Utah Hockey Club finished it strong. Barrett Hayton scored and had two assists, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Winnipeg Jets 5-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks win Best of Utah as Smith wins all-around
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #5 Red Rocks broke out in a big way on Monday night at the Maverik Center, posting a 197.950 to win the Best of Utah meet and tying Oklahoma for the highest score in the nation this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz blow 25-point lead in overtime loss to Pelicans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) - CJ McCollum scored six of his 45 points in overtime and the New Orleans Pelicans orchestrated the largest comeback in franchise history, overcoming a 25-point deficit to beat Utah Jazz 123-119 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Almost a dozen Chicagoland natives are on the rosters for the teams playing in Monday's CFP Championship Game
item.description: Nearly a dozen Chicagoland natives will have a chance to win a College Football Playoff championship on Monday night in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Run, Eagles, run: Massive plays on the ground power Eagles to NFC Championship Game
item.description: These Philly Snow Birds had cause for celebration -- they will host the NFC championship game Sunday against Washington, after the Commanders upset No. 1 seed Detroit on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hoyer says Cubs are focused on improving bullpen and bench
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Cubs are focused on improving their bullpen and bench at this point in the offseason, according to president of baseball operations Jed Hoyer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
